headline: Digital availability from less than 5% to 60% at SCI. Quote-to-sale conversion doubled at CBA.
evidence: Digital availability from less than 5% to 60% at SCI. Digital sales from 20% to 70% at CBA with headcount held flat. Quote-to-sale conversion 20% to 50% in CBA home buying channel. End-to-end digital underwriting with real-time pricing at SCI. Broker portal redesign with RPA and API integrations eliminating double-keying.
